query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN incentivado = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as incentivados,
  SUM(CASE WHEN spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp IS NOT NULL AND spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_gross_up,
  SUM(CASE WHEN zspread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_zspread
FROM spread_analysis;

  SUM(CASE WHEN incentivado = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as incentivados,
  SUM(CASE WHEN spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp IS NOT NULL AND spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_gross_up,
  SUM(CASE WHEN zspread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_zspread
FROM spread_analysis;
